description: Samples graded by check_result.py --selftest. The rejected ones are what make a green run meaningful: a grader that accepts everything proves nothing.

samples.reason: reference result for the base case
reference result for the Makefile-driven case
reference partial result with exclusions declared
reference failure result that stops before scanning
copies a credential literal out of the fixture repository into a finding
cites a line past end of file and a path that does not exist
grounds a finding in a path outside the analysed repository
reports status success while a completion check is false
grounds a finding in vendored code and declares no exclusions
